license_note: This is a researched index/derived data structure. Check original sites before redistributing at scale; source URLs are preserved per entry.

notation.sequence_format: Concatenated coordinates, e.g. C4c3D3c5. In the UltraBoardGames source black moves are capitalized; moves[] is lowercase and color is inferred by ply index.
notation.color_inference: moves[0], moves[2], ... are black; moves[1], moves[3], ... are white.
notation.symmetry_note: Some Japanese sources use an f5-first orientation while many English catalogs use c4-first. Treat rotations/reflections as equivalent only if your engine normalizes board symmetry.

sources.title: Catalog of Opening Moves for Othello
sources.notes: Robert Gatliff compiled named opening catalog; black moves are capitalized in the source.

sources.title: Opening List
sources.notes: Hong Kong Othello Association opening tree/list, used as corroborating hierarchy/source.

sources.title: Opening Dic
sources.notes: Large hierarchical dictionary of contemporary opening names, used as name/hierarchy reference.

sources.title: 棋譜/定石 - オセロ Wiki*
sources.notes: Japanese page listing representative named joseki such as 兎, 虎, 牛, 鼠.

sources.title: オセロ定石集 | othlog
sources.notes: Japanese opening-book style list with named sequences and evaluation notes.

openings.primary_name: ブライトウェルもどき
japanese_names: ブライトウェルもどき
